# Rewansh — Digital Marketing Consultant

> Rewansh (Rewansh Kayare) is a digital marketing consultant based in India, working with startups, D2C brands, SaaS companies, and enterprises across India, the US, UK, Germany, UAE, Canada, Australia, Singapore, and other markets remotely. Core services: SEO & search growth, paid media (Google Ads & Meta Ads), content marketing, marketing automation & AI systems, social media marketing, and conversion rate optimization.

Rewansh works directly with founders and marketing teams as a hands-on consultant, not through an account-managed agency team. Every engagement starts with an audit before any spend commitment. Pricing starts at $349 + tax for a one-time strategy session, with ongoing "Growth Partner" retainers from $549 + tax/month and custom enterprise engagements. All work is fully remote, covering overlapping hours across time zones for international clients — including founders and marketing teams in Indore and Hyderabad, with no local office required.

## Services

- [SEO & Search Growth](https://rewansh.com/seo-search-growth/): Technical SEO audits, intent-mapped keyword strategy, and content-driven link building for search engines and AI answer engines.
- [Paid Media & PPC](https://rewansh.com/paid-media-ppc/): Google Ads and Meta Ads strategy, audience targeting, conversion tracking, and creative testing.
- [Social Media Marketing](https://rewansh.com/social-media-marketing/): LinkedIn, Instagram, and YouTube content systems for founders and brands.
- [Marketing Automation](https://rewansh.com/marketing-automation/): AI-powered content, email, and lead-generation systems; CRM workflows and drip sequences.
- [Content Marketing](https://rewansh.com/content-marketing/): Content strategy tied directly to SEO and lead generation, not just publishing volume.
- [Conversion Rate Optimization](https://rewansh.com/conversion-rate-optimization/): Landing page and funnel optimization measured against acquisition cost.

## Markets

- [United States](https://rewansh.com/us/): Remote digital marketing consulting with full US business-hours overlap and USD invoicing.
- [United Kingdom](https://rewansh.com/uk/): Remote digital marketing consulting with full UK business-hours overlap.
- [UAE](https://rewansh.com/uae/): Remote digital marketing consulting covering Dubai, Abu Dhabi, and the wider UAE.
- [Germany](https://rewansh.com/germany/): Remote digital marketing consulting with GDPR-conscious marketing automation and CET/CEST overlap.
- [Mumbai](https://rewansh.com/mumbai/): Remote digital marketing consulting for Mumbai D2C, fintech, and services businesses.
- [Bangalore](https://rewansh.com/bangalore/): Remote digital marketing consulting for Bangalore SaaS and B2B tech startups.
- [Delhi NCR](https://rewansh.com/delhi/): Remote digital marketing consulting for Delhi, Gurugram, and Noida businesses.
- [Pune](https://rewansh.com/pune/): Remote digital marketing consulting for Pune IT, D2C, and services businesses.

## Articles

- [How to Increase Organic Traffic: A Practical Framework](https://rewansh.com/blog/how-to-increase-organic-traffic.html): Technical SEO, intent-mapped content, topical authority, link building, and AI answer engine optimization.
- [How to Lower Customer Acquisition Cost Without Cutting Growth](https://rewansh.com/blog/how-to-lower-customer-acquisition-cost.html): Channel audits, conversion fixes, owned-channel investment, and automation.
- [The Marketing Audit Checklist Every Founder Should Run](https://rewansh.com/blog/marketing-audit-checklist.html): The SEO, paid, content, and conversion checklist used before every new engagement.
- [How to Scale a D2C Brand Without Burning Cash on Ads](https://rewansh.com/blog/how-to-scale-a-d2c-brand.html): Owned audiences, retention over acquisition, and real unit economics.
- [How AI Is Changing Digital Marketing in 2026](https://rewansh.com/blog/ai-digital-marketing-trends.html): Content at scale, AI-driven paid media, and the SEO/AEO split.
- [Digital Marketing Consultant vs. Agency vs. Freelancer: How to Choose](https://rewansh.com/blog/digital-marketing-consultant-vs-agency-vs-freelancer.html): A framework for matching stage, budget, and access needs to the right format.
- [How Much Should You Spend on Google & Meta Ads?](https://rewansh.com/blog/paid-media-budget-framework.html): A paid media budget framework based on funnel stage and unit economics.
- [Social Media Marketing Strategy for D2C & SaaS Brands](https://rewansh.com/blog/social-media-marketing-strategy-d2c-saas.html): Why D2C and SaaS need different platform and content strategies.
- [Which Countries Can You Work With as a Remote Marketing Consultant?](https://rewansh.com/blog/which-countries-remote-marketing-consultant.html): Direct answer covering the US, UK, Germany, UAE, Canada, Australia, Singapore, India, and beyond, plus how time zones and invoicing work.
- [Answer Engine Optimization: How to Get Cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity, and AI Overviews](https://rewansh.com/blog/answer-engine-optimization-guide.html): Structured data, FAQ schema, and content structure that AI answer engines actually pull from.
- [How Much Does a Digital Marketing Consultant Cost in the US in 2026?](https://rewansh.com/blog/digital-marketing-consultant-cost-us.html): US pricing compared across freelancers, consultants, and agencies.
- [GDPR-Compliant Marketing Automation: A Practical Guide for German Companies](https://rewansh.com/blog/gdpr-compliant-marketing-automation-germany.html): Consent, data minimization, vendor DPAs, and the right to erasure in marketing automation workflows.
- [Google Ads Benchmarks in the UAE: CPC, Budgets, and ROI by Industry](https://rewansh.com/blog/google-ads-benchmarks-uae.html): Typical CPC ranges and budget minimums for UAE Google Ads campaigns.
- [SEO Agency vs. Consultant in the UK: Real Cost and Access Trade-offs](https://rewansh.com/blog/seo-agency-vs-consultant-uk.html): UK SEO pricing compared and when each format makes sense.
- [Best Marketing Automation Tools for Canadian Startups: HubSpot vs. ActiveCampaign vs. Klaviyo](https://rewansh.com/blog/marketing-automation-tools-canada.html): How to choose based on business model and stage.
- [SEO for Australian D2C Brands: Local Search vs. Global Reach](https://rewansh.com/blog/seo-for-australian-d2c-brands.html): How to sequence local vs. international SEO investment.
- [Paid Media Benchmarks for B2B SaaS Lead Gen in Singapore](https://rewansh.com/blog/paid-media-benchmarks-singapore-b2b-saas.html): Typical CPL/CAC ranges for Google and LinkedIn Ads.
- [Conversion Rate Benchmarks by Industry: What's Actually "Good" for D2C, SaaS, and Fintech](https://rewansh.com/blog/conversion-rate-benchmarks-by-industry.html): Typical conversion rate ranges and how to know if yours is underperforming.
- [Digital Marketing Trends for Indian Startups in 2026](https://rewansh.com/blog/digital-marketing-trends-indian-startups-2026.html): AEO, rising paid social CAC, regional-language content, and automation shifts to plan around.
